Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 265 

TMSIS_RUN_ID 

LABEL: TMSIS State Data Processing Run Identifier 

DESCRIPTION: Identifier for the processing run that produced the T-MSIS source data. 

SHORT NAME: TMSIS_RUN_ID 

LONG NAME: TMSIS_RUN_ID 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): All header claim and line files 

VALUES: XXXX 

COMMENT: Higher numbers indicate later run dates.
